task_description: Replace the network init code (doLoopback in internal/cli/rc/rc.go) with u-root's libinit.NetInit() which uses netlink to bring up the loopback interface. Since kernel 6.8+ handles loopback address/route configuration automatically, the old shell-out to /sbin/ip for adding 127.0.0.1/8 and routes is no longer necessary.
